user.title: Enable Banking — application JWT
user.description: Paste the JWT (bearer token) for your Enable Banking application. This authenticates the integration to Enable Banking's API and is used to fetch the list of supported banks.

country.title: Select country
country.description: Which country is the bank in?

aspsp.title: Select bank and account type
aspsp.description: Banks in {country}. Also choose whether this is a personal or business account.

auth.title: Authorise at your bank
auth.description:
**[Open this link to authorise at your bank]({auth_url})**

After logging in you will be redirected to enablebanking.com. Copy the `code` value from the URL bar (it looks like `?code=abc…`) and paste it below.

reauth_jwt.title: Re-authenticate with Enable Banking
reauth_jwt.description: Your **{aspsp_name}** consent has expired or been revoked. Confirm your JWT below (it is pre-filled if it is still valid) and then authorise a new session at your bank.

reauth_auth.title: Authorise at your bank
reauth_auth.description:
**[Open this link to re-authorise at your bank]({auth_url})**

Paste the `code` value from the redirect URL below.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Enable Banking — check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: The JWT was rejected — check that it is signed with your application's private key and has not expired.
error.invalid_session: The session ID is unknown, revoked, or expired — complete the bank authorisation again.
error.invalid_auth_code: The authorisation code was rejected — make sure you copied the full `code` value from the redirect URL.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This bank session is already configured

init.title: Enable Banking options ({aspsp_name})
init.description: Optionally override the IBAN for this account. Leave blank to use whatever the bank reports via the API.
